items.title: Ampers&One defines new chapter with tradition-rooted 'God'
items.snippet: Boy band Ampers&One returned after eight months with a clearer sense of identity, unveiling its fourth EP “Definition” as a statement of both direction and intent. At a press showc...
items.description: Boy band Ampers&One returned after eight months with a clearer sense of identity, unveiling its fourth EP “Definition” as a statement of both direction and intent. At a press showcase held at Nodeul Live House in central Seoul, the septet — Kamden, Brian, Jiho, Siyun, Kyrell, Mackiah and Seungmo — framed the new release as a turning point, marking not just a comeback but the beginning of a new chapter. items.title: BTS adds 3 shows to Latin American leg of 'Arirang' world tour
items.snippet: K-pop superstar BTS announced Wednesday that it will add three concerts to the Latin American leg of its "Arirang" world tour in October. The group said on the K-pop fan community...
items.description: K-pop superstar BTS announced Wednesday that it will add three concerts to the Latin American leg of its "Arirang" world tour in October. The group said on the K-pop fan community platform Weverse that it will stage one additional show each in Lima, Peru; Santiago, Chile; and Buenos Aires, Argentina. The additions bring its total number of performances in the region to 14 across five countries, which also include Colombia and Brazil. The updated October itinerary features performances in Bogota

items.title: BTS’ ‘Swim’ knocked down to No. 2 on Billboard’s Hot 100
items.snippet: In its second week on Billboard’s Hot 100, BTS lead single “Swim” backstroked down a rung to No. 2, according to the chart preview published Monday in the US. The single made a cha...
items.description: In its second week on Billboard’s Hot 100, BTS lead single “Swim” backstroked down a rung to No. 2, according to the chart preview published Monday in the US. The single made a chart-topping debut on the main songs chart the previous week and has since maintained the top spot in terms of digital sales. items.title: KickFlip wants eyes on it with 4th EP ‘My First Kick’
items.snippet: Boy band KickFlip returned Monday with its fourth EP, “My First Kick,” leaning further into the bright, unruly energy the group has been building since its debut into a bolder coll...
items.description: Boy band KickFlip returned Monday with its fourth EP, “My First Kick,” leaning further into the bright, unruly energy the group has been building since its debut into a bolder collective statement. At a showcase in eastern Seoul, KickFlip introduced the seven-track album as a release built around “firsts,” from entering their 20s to taking on new musical and performance challenges. items.title: Seventeen powers through rain-soaked finale, promises future together at ‘New_’ encore
items.snippet: Under flashes of lightning and pouring rain, Seventeen brought its seven-month world tour to an emotional close in Incheon, turning what could have been a disruption into one of th...
items.description: Under flashes of lightning and pouring rain, Seventeen brought its seven-month world tour to an emotional close in Incheon, turning what could have been a disruption into one of the most memorable moments of the show. Held April 4-5 at Incheon Asiad Main Stadium, boy band Seventeen’s world tour encore concert, “New_,” marked the final stop of the group’s global tour, which began at the same venue in September and spanned 14 cities, drawing more than 900,000 fans online and offline. items.title: What’s driving the recent wave of K-pop idol departures
items.snippet: A recent wave of departures by popular idols — from Heeseung of Enhypen to Mark and Ten of NCT — has surprised fans, with multiple members leaving their groups within a single mont...
items.description: A recent wave of departures by popular idols — from Heeseung of Enhypen to Mark and Ten of NCT — has surprised fans, with multiple members leaving their groups within a single month. Industry insiders, however, say such moves are not unusual, particularly among idols in the later stages of their careers. They point to a combination of artistic ambition, contract cycles and the growing financial independence enabled by social media. Heeseung announced on March 10 that he would leave Enhypen and t

items.title: Ten of NCT to leave SM following Mark’s departure
items.snippet: Ten of NCT and WayV has ended his exclusive contract with SM Entertainment as of Monday, the agency confirmed. “After in-depth discussions with Ten regarding his future activities,...
items.description: Ten of NCT and WayV has ended his exclusive contract with SM Entertainment as of Monday, the agency confirmed. “After in-depth discussions with Ten regarding his future activities, we have agreed to conclude his exclusive contract as of April 8,” SM Entertainment said in a statement. “We will continue to coordinate so that Ten can participate in WayV and NCT group activities in the future.” The Thai idol’s future participation in NCT and WayV activities are expected to be arranged on a case-by-c

items.title: Ex-NCT Mark leaves message before quitting fan platform
items.snippet: Mark, formerly of NCT, had a brief chat with fans Monday on a fan communication platform before closing his account. “I wanted to tell you in person before but it was not something...
items.description: Mark, formerly of NCT, had a brief chat with fans Monday on a fan communication platform before closing his account. “I wanted to tell you in person before but it was not something I could act on based on my personal feelings … everyone must have been quite surprised,” he said. The idol apologized and expressed thanks, but told fans he would be back soon, trailed by a crying emoji. SM Entertainment made the announcement Friday that Mark will leave NCT and the management company effective April 8

items.title: T.O.P proves himself strong with 1st solo LP
items.snippet: T.O.P's first solo full-length album reaffirmed his strength across music charts and platforms. His LP “Another Dimension,” released April 3, generated approximately 1.47 million s...
items.description: T.O.P's first solo full-length album reaffirmed his strength across music charts and platforms. His LP “Another Dimension,” released April 3, generated approximately 1.47 million streams on Spotify on the day of release, the most for an album released this year from a K-pop solo artist. It is the first K-pop solo album this year to surpass 1 million streams on the platform. The 11-track set topped the iTunes Top Albums Chart in 15 regions, ranking No. 3 on iTunes Albums Chart Worldwide and hitti

items.title: BTS’ ‘Arirang’ tops Billboard 200 for second consecutive week, a K-pop first
items.snippet: BTS’ fifth album has topped the Billboard 200 albums chart for the second consecutive week, becoming the first K-pop album to achieve the feat. According to a chart preview release...
items.description: BTS’ fifth album has topped the Billboard 200 albums chart for the second consecutive week, becoming the first K-pop album to achieve the feat. According to a chart preview released by Billboard on Sunday, “Arirang” remained at No. 1 on the main albums chart, surpassing new releases including Ye’s “Bully,” which debuted at No. 2, and Melanie Martinez’s “Hades” at No. 3. BTS’ latest achievement marks the group’s seventh No. 1 album on the Billboard 200. The Billboard 200 ranks albums based on a c

items.title: All Seventeen members renew contracts
items.snippet: All 13 members of Seventeen chose to stay with the group, renewing their contracts with Pledis Entertainment for the second time. Leader S. Coups broke the news Sunday in Incheon a...
items.description: All 13 members of Seventeen chose to stay with the group, renewing their contracts with Pledis Entertainment for the second time. Leader S. Coups broke the news Sunday in Incheon at the final encore concert for Seventeen's “New_” tour. He said the members had come to the decision after a long and deep discussion, and hoped to “row hard forward together on the same ship.” S. Coups, on stage with only eight other members, added that “It would have been even better if Hoshi and Woozi were here, too

items.title: 3 injured after safety fence collapses at Super Junior concert in Seoul
items.snippet: Three spectators were injured after a safety fence collapsed during a Super Junior concert in Seoul on Sunday, prompting an apology from SM Entertainment, the group's agency. The a...
items.description: Three spectators were injured after a safety fence collapsed during a Super Junior concert in Seoul on Sunday, prompting an apology from SM Entertainment, the group's agency. The accident occurred during the last of three Seoul concerts held by the K-pop group at the KSPO Dome when member Ryeowook approached the audience while performing an encore song, according to the agency. Fans surged forward, causing the fence in the seating area to give way. The concert was part of the group's "Super Show

items.title: The playbook behind BTS’ ‘Arirang’: 3 strategies reshaping K-pop’s global reach
items.snippet: BTS’ fifth full-length album “Arirang” is breaking K-pop records, topping the Billboard 200 while its lead track “Swim” simultaneously claims the No. 1 spot on the Hot 100. Thirtee...
items.description: BTS’ fifth full-length album “Arirang” is breaking K-pop records, topping the Billboard 200 while its lead track “Swim” simultaneously claims the No. 1 spot on the Hot 100. Thirteen of the album’s 14 tracks — including “Swim” — have also entered the Hot 100, marking an unprecedented feat for a K-pop release. Beyond the numbers, industry observers say the album’s success reflects a carefully constructed strategy that signals a new phase not only for BTS, but also for K-pop’s global expansion. At

items.title: BTS tops Spotify weekly charts for 2nd week with new album 'Arirang'
items.snippet: K-pop megastar BTS topped Spotify's weekly charts for the second straight week with its latest album "Arirang," the septet's agency said Saturday. The group remained atop the globa...
items.description: K-pop megastar BTS topped Spotify's weekly charts for the second straight week with its latest album "Arirang," the septet's agency said Saturday. The group remained atop the global music streaming platform's three charts -- Weekly Top Albums Global, Weekly Top Songs Global and Weekly Top Artists Global -- for the week from March 27 to Thursday, according to BigHit Music. items.title: T.O.P drops ‘Another Dimension’ ahead of Big Bang’s Coachella anniversary stage
items.snippet: T.O.P has made a long-awaited return with his first full-length album, released Friday. It marks his first solo release in 13 years since “Doom Dada.” The rapper released “Another...
items.description: T.O.P has made a long-awaited return with his first full-length album, released Friday. It marks his first solo release in 13 years since “Doom Dada.” The rapper released “Another Dimension” along with the music video for one of its two main tracks, “Desperado.” “Desperado” delivers a candid and direct portrayal of love, with a minimalist music video that focuses on the track’s intense mood and T.O.P’s nuanced emotional expression. “For almost 10 years, I focused solely on making music,” T.O.P s
